data.content: Now I'll replace all `DateTime.UtcNow` usages with `TimeProvider` and add it as a constructor parameter.

data.content: Done. All four `DateTime.UtcNow` calls have been replaced with `_timeProvider.GetUtcNow().UtcDateTime`, and `TimeProvider` was added as a constructor parameter with a backing field. Since it's already registered in your DI container (`Program.cs` line 3), the service will receive it automatically.
